name: Neck rolls
instruction: Stand tall. Slow, deliberate circles of the head — 5 each way. Breathe through your nose.

name: Shoulder openers
instruction: Clasp hands behind back. Lift chest, drop shoulders back. Hold 20s, release, repeat 3x.

name: Hip flexor stretch
instruction: Kneel on one knee, drive hips forward. 45s each side. Your chair has been compressing this all morning.

name: Standing forward fold
instruction: Feet hip-width. Hinge at hips, let arms hang. Soft knees. Stay 90 seconds. Let gravity do the work.

name: Cat-cow flow
instruction: On hands and knees. Inhale, arch. Exhale, round. 10 cycles at a pace that feels good.

name: Box breathing
instruction: Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. Repeat for the full break. This is the one Navy SEALs use.

name: Physiological sigh
instruction: Double inhale through nose, one long exhale through mouth. Repeat for 3–5 minutes. Fastest way to downshift the nervous system.

name: 30 deep breaths
instruction: 30 full inhales through the nose, passive exhales. Then hold the exhale as long as comfortable. One round.
Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Then find another. Do this for the whole break. Let your eyes reset.

name: Palming
instruction: Rub palms warm. Cup them over closed eyes without touching the lids. Breathe into the dark for the full break.

name: Near-far focus
instruction: Hold a finger at arm's length. Focus on it, then a distant object. Switch slowly, 20 cycles.

name: Short walk
instruction: Out the door. Around the block. No phone. Come back when the timer says so.

name: Stairs
instruction: Find the nearest staircase. Up and down at a pace that gets your heart moving. Stop when the timer does.

name: Stand at the window
instruction: Stand by a window. Look outside. Let your eyes travel — near, far, sky. No agenda.

name: Body scan
instruction: Sit, eyes closed. Starting at your feet, move attention slowly up the body. Notice without fixing.

name: Count to ten
instruction: Sit. Count each exhale up to 10, then start again. When you lose count, restart without judgement.

name: Listen outward
instruction: Close your eyes. For the full break, name each sound you hear in the order you hear it. That's the whole practice.

name: Wall sit
instruction: Back flat to a wall, thighs parallel to the floor. Hold for 60 seconds, rest 30, repeat twice.

name: Wrist stretch
instruction: Arm out, palm up. Gently pull fingers down with the other hand. 30s each side, twice.

name: Legs up the wall
instruction: Lie on the floor, legs straight up a wall. Arms relaxed. This does more than it looks like it should.

name: Drink water
instruction: Fill a full glass. Drink it slowly — not in one go. You're probably already mildly dehydrated.
